sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41771" key="e)poikonomi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐποικονομ-ία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n41771.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">apporlionment,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἔργων ἢ παθῶν ἐ.</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rhetorical arrangement</tr_> of them, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Longin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.2</biblScope> </bibl>(nisi leg. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐποικοδομία</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
